ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-19-2022 Continued To Aug-16-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Denise Eaton-May, via Zoom, for Amber Bowser and Ayeesha Steverson, Personal Representatives.

The court reminds counsel of the status of this case especially the lack of either a petition for final distribution or a report to approve status of administration. Counsel reports of her clients working with creditors, that the estate is ready to close, and expects to file a petition by the end of this week.

The matter is continued to Aug-16-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file either of the petitions mentioned above by Aug-02-2022.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.
